title: Pilot Paperless-ngx document archive
goal: Pilot Paperless-ngx only after backup/restore evidence exists, using a small controlled document sample.

acceptance.assertion: Paperless media, consume, export and database persistence paths are included in the backup plan.
A small sample import proves OCR and full-text search without making Paperless the Lenskit/RepoBrief truth source.
A restore probe covers at least one imported document or the missing restore prerequisite is recorded.
Tags/correspondents/document types remain minimal and reversible during the pilot.

metadata.source_request: Evaluate every interesting utility tool and register the resulting plan in Bureau.
